prestazioni: Engine: S20 (2.0L DOHC inline-6, 24-valve) with forged internals upgrade—JUN Auto’s S20 stroker kit (87mm crank, 88mm pistons, billet connecting rods) to displace 2.2L, paired with Tomei 272° camshafts (11.5mm lift) and a custom-machined intake manifold for optimized airflow at 10,500 RPM redline.

Forced Induction: Garrett GT3076R turbocharger (0.86 A/R turbine housing) with a custom anti-lag system (HKS SSQV blow-off valve, GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller) targeting 1.4 bar (20.3 psi) on 100-octane fuel, mated to a custom front-mount intercooler (GReddy Type-R, 600x300x76mm core) with -10AN silicone hoses and Earl’s Performance fittings.

Drivetrain & Handling: OS Giken 2-way LSD (plate-type, 45% lockup) in a reinforced R200 differential housing, paired with a Holinger RD6 sequential gearbox (dog-ring engagement, 1.5kg lightweight flywheel) and a custom driveshaft (JUN Auto, 3.5-inch diameter, carbon-fiber center section). Suspension: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (24-way adjustable damping, 30mm front/25mm rear ride height adjustment) with polyurethane bushings (SuperPro 90A durometer) and custom subframe reinforcement plates (Cusco, 4mm thick).
estetica: Body: Rocket Bunny KPGC110-specific widebody kit (Pandem, 3-piece fiberglass fenders, 50mm front/60mm rear overfenders) with custom carbon-fiber front splitter (Seibon, 3D-scanned for KPGC110 chassis) and a fixed rear wing (Voltex Type-3, 1,200mm span, 300mm chord, 3D-printed aluminum endplates).

Interior: Bride Zeta III bucket seats (FRP shell, 6-point Schroth Profi II harnesses) mounted on custom aluminum floor pans (JUN Auto, 2mm thick), paired with a MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (350mm diameter, suede grip) and a custom roll cage (Sparco Pro2000, 25CrMo4 steel, 38mm diameter, 2.5mm wall thickness) with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360, 4kg agent).

Lighting & Details: Custom LED headlight conversion (Morimoto XB35, HID projectors with 5,000K color temperature) in Cibie Oscar-style housings, paired with a full carbon-fiber hood (Seibon, 1.5mm thick, 30% weight reduction) and a custom rear diffuser (Aeroflow, 3D-printed PETG, 3-stage Gurney flaps). Wheels: Work Meister S1 3P (15x10 +15 front, 15x11 +20 rear) with Yokohama Advan A052 tires (225/50R15 front, 245/45R15 rear).
